title: Update Python AnnounceMessage to use rx_channel

close_reason: Python AnnounceMessage standardized to rx_channel per epic and spec (CCP-9). Dataclass, validation (0-7), signed_data (offset 42), serialization, from_bytes, with_incremented_hop_count, tests, scheduler, processor, node.py all updated and consistent.
